TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_gaga_na_maniq, title = gaga_na_maniq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/gaga_na_maniq} }

S.FORM: gaga na maniq 1.mgluw maniq ga,siki tehuq kwara qu qutux nasal 2.qmqway rramat ga si qaniq bung nana,ini msyaw qmqway rramat naha,suqu maniq bung nana lga iwan tmasuq maniq la . 3.mgluw maniq qutux nasal ga,ini phmut sgatu ru ini hnqzyanq kmal

gaga na maniq 1.mgluw maniq ga,siki tehuq kwara qu qutux nasal 2.qmqway rramat ga si qaniq bung nana,ini msyaw qmqway rramat naha,suqu maniq bung nana lga iwan tmasuq maniq la . 3.mgluw maniq qutux nasal ga,ini phmut sgatu ru ini hnqzyanq kmal
S.PHON: ɣaɣa na maniq *.mɣluw maniq ɣa,s~ɕiki teħuq kwara qu qutux nas~ɕal *.qmqwaj rramat ɣa s~ɕi qaniq βuŋ nana,ini ms~ɕjaw qmqwaj rramat naħa,s~ɕuqu maniq βuŋ nana lɣa iwan tmas~ɕuq maniq la . *.mɣluw maniq qutux nas~ɕal ɣa,ini pħmut s~ɕɣatu ru ini ħnqzjanq kmal
